Asuer (Pty) Ltd
Ashwood House, Ballywoods Office Park, 33 Ballyclare Drive, Bryanston, 2191
010 8237 237
info@asuer.co.za
www.asuer.co.za

17 July 2026

Ms Thandeka Mokoena
124 Vilakazi Street
Orlando West, Soweto
1804

Dear Ms Mokoena,

RE: Appointment as an independent sales representative

Thank you for choosing to build something of your own alongside Asuer. It is a pleasure to confirm your appointment as an independent sales representative, effective 1 August 2026. This letter sets out what you can expect from us and what we ask of you in return.

Our promise is simple: to put dependable financial products and the support to sell them well within reach of everyday South Africans. You are the person who makes that promise real in your community, and we are here to back you at every step.

What we provide

  • Full onboarding and accredited product training, at no cost to you.
  • A digital toolkit for quoting, applications and tracking your earnings.
  • Weekly settlement of commissions earned, paid directly to your nominated account.
  • A dedicated support desk on 010 8237 237 for you and your customers.

What we ask of you

That you represent Asuer honestly, treat every customer fairly, and keep the trust that people place in you. Full terms are set out in the enclosed representative agreement, which we will walk through together at your onboarding session.

Your next step

Please bring your ID, proof of banking and proof of address to the Bryanston office on 28 July 2026 at 09:00. We look forward to welcoming you.

We are genuinely glad to have you with us, and we are confident that this is the start of a rewarding journey.

Yours sincerely,

Lerato Nkosi

Head of Sales Force · Asuer
